_TimeZone_comment: IANA tz id used when converting stored UTC datetimes for display + reports. Falls back to TimeZoneInfo.Local when unset or unrecognized.

Email._comment: SMTP credentials used for outbound mail (weight-sheet copies, alerts). Mirrors the legacy Windows app's smtp2go config. When TestMode.Enabled = true every recipient is rewritten to TestMode.Recipient, so a dev box can exercise the email flow without touching producers.

TestMode._comment: When Enabled is true, every send is redirected to Recipient. The original recipient list is included in the body so you can verify the routing.

Modules._comment: DeploymentMode controls all module visibility. 'Central' = HQ admin (DatabaseAdmin, WarehouseAdmin, SeedAdmin, Accounts, Locations, System, Users + Reporting). 'Remote' = field location (WarehouseIntake, Scales, GrowerDelivery + Reporting). 'Reporting' = reporting-only site. Seed is available on Remote but gated per-location via UseForSeed in the database.
Modules._AllowedLocationIds_comment: Restrict to specific location IDs. Empty array = all locations allowed

ScaleReader._comment: Scale Reader Service — polls scales via TCP/SMA and pushes weight via SignalR
